response.headline: Likely AI-generated
response.label: 🤖 Likely AI-generated. Our analysis suggests this text was most likely produced by an AI tool. Two independent checks — a language-model review and a writing-style analysis — pointed the same way. We're only moderately confident in this estimate. No automated check is perfect. If you wrote this yourself, you can appeal and a person will review it. (confidence 56%)

signals.llm_reason: Generic phrasing and uniform rhythm dominate the passage.

response.headline: Likely written by a person
response.label: ✍️ Likely written by a person. Our analysis suggests this text was most likely written by a human. Both of our checks pointed the same way. We're only moderately confident in this estimate. This is our best estimate, not a guarantee. (confidence 60%)

signals.llm_reason: Passage contains specific lived detail and personal voice.
